content: Task bootstrap for timezone meeting coordination. Capability focus: Recent Constraint Tracking.
Choose one candidate slot from latest thread and normalize all final times to Pacific Time.
Required ICS fields: DTSTART, DTEND, SUMMARY, ATTENDEE, ORGANIZER.
Historical thread used ET as display timezone; old references remain in mailbox cache.
CC must include ops-review@example.com in summary text.
Temporary side task: verify participant email spelling, then continue scheduling.
Will resume scheduling after contact verification.
Source A calendar cache shows old slot A. Source B latest email thread shows slot C as current preference.
Final reminder: selected slot must be one of latest valid windows and timezone must be PT.

EMAIL_THREAD:
From: alice@example.com
To: bob@example.com, carol@example.com
Subject: Q4 Review Meeting
Date: Mon, 15 Jan 2024 09:00:00 -0500

Hi team,

Let's schedule the Q4 review meeting.

Proposed slots:
- Slot A (OLD): Tue 16 Jan 10:00-11:30 ET
- Slot B: Wed 17 Jan 14:00-15:30 ET
- Slot C (PREFERRED): Thu 18 Jan 11:00-12:30 ET

Please confirm by EOD.

Thanks,
Alice

---

From: bob@example.com
To: alice@example.com, carol@example.com
Subject: Re: Q4 Review Meeting
Date: Mon, 15 Jan 2024 14:30:00 -0500

Slot C works for me.

---

From: carol@example.com
To: alice@example.com, bob@example.com
Subject: Re: Q4 Review Meeting
Date: Mon, 15 Jan 2024 16:45:00 -0500

+1 for Slot C.
